description: Initial performance, scenario duration, command latency, and network budgets for MUTestServer JSONL evidence. Entries are optional by default so a scenario can be analyzed even when it does not exercise every marker or connected network path.

budgets.description: Connected session should become ready without a long join stall.
Authentication and initial model join should stay below one second when connect_ready is emitted.
Audio callback p95 should stay comfortably below realtime pressure.
Audio callback worst sampled value should not spike into audible-risk territory.
Server model rebuild should not block UI updates for a full frame budget.
Message render block construction should remain under a visible frame hitch threshold.
Main-thread stall monitor should not observe long UI responsiveness gaps during probe scenarios.

networkBudgets.description: When UDP ping is observed in connected scenarios, the mean should stay below an obvious unstable-network threshold.
When packet accounting is observed in connected scenarios, loss should stay below a clearly degraded voice threshold.
Network timeline should not accumulate repeated warning-level lifecycle events during short probe scenarios.
Network timeline should not include error-level lifecycle events during passing probe scenarios.

scenarioBudgets.description: UI/model performance sampling should complete quickly enough to catch obvious refresh or observation regressions.
Synthetic UDP degradation evidence should be captured and analyzed without making the probe suite slow.
UDP toast throttling should remain quick enough to catch status-flapping UI regressions.
Idle background/foreground lifecycle simulation should not look hung while proving audio stays stopped.
Every probe scenario should finish before it looks hung or visibly too slow for smoke automation.

waitBudgets.descriptionText: Each semantic wait should complete before the probe-level wait timeout is exhausted.

commandBudgets.description: Model refresh command used by ui-performance-sampling should not block the WebSocket command loop.
Performance sampling command should stay responsive while collecting UI/model evidence.
State snapshot command should stay responsive during UI/model sampling.
UI snapshot command should stay responsive during UI/model sampling.
App snapshot command should stay responsive during UI/model sampling.
Every MUTestServer command should round-trip quickly enough to rule out hung automation or obviously blocked app-side command handling.
